parameters.boundary_signal: cos(4 theta + 0.17) + 0.35 sin(7 theta - 0.31) - 0.18 cos(11 theta + 0.43)
parameters.comparison_norm: mass-weighted boundary L2 against FEM boundary point values
parameters.fem_baseline: volumetric P1 radial-fan FEM; boundary Schur-complement DtN; generalized Steklov eigensystem for operator functions
parameters.q_baseline: matrix-free planar chord QJet with borrow-compute-repay ledger
